sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13947" key="a)posfrante/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποσφρ-αντέον</orth>, <sense id="n13947.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must cause to smell,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐτὰς τοῖς δυσώδεσι</foreign> Aspasia ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:72" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.72</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
